column1: Hey Andrew, thanks for your interest in traveling with Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from Go Blue here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
sup were you still looking for help from us with spring break?
Yo what's up. My boys and I want to go to Cabo for spring break. Do you guys have specific hotel recommendations? Would we book it through you guys?
yea we handle bookings and accommodations. how many ppl in the group?
thats solid! which school you all from?
word we have a few Lehigh groups rollin with us. gonna be lit
y'all def know how to party
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
ok bet thanks. Within this week would be awesome.
okay bet yea lets do it. I'll send what we have at the moment and add a payment plan. lets you reserve things with a deposit and then pay the rest off in a few weeks
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
Liked “okay bet yea lets do it. I'll send what we have at the moment and add a payment plan. lets you reserve things with a deposit and then pay the rest off in a few weeks”
just sent that over lmk if it came through
What hotel would u recommend for us (all under 21) if we like to party and go to the casino? Does not have to be Cabo
I'd say Cancun Grans Oasis is exactly what you're lookin for
Ok great thanks. Could you send over the info for that?
yea I got you its in the email thread I sent you. under the Cancun heading
yoo Andrew whats good bro, how we feelin about those options so far?
Yo. We are leaning toward Grand Oasis Cancun. Could we do a Tuesday night - Saturday? So four nights and coming back Saturday. Does that work?
yea lets do it bro. green light
want me to get this set up for y'all?
Could I get back to you tmr? Just waiting on one of my boys approval with his calendar.
Yo what's up. It's now 6 of us and we wanna go to Grand Oasis Cancun. Ideally march 7th-11th. If those dates don't work than 10th-14th also works.
Word we can do either or bro
I can set it up for 7th to 11th. Two rooms of 3
Bet I'll set this up right now and send over
just emailed that over, but here it is too https://secure.springbreaku.com/site/public/share/3PIPGXIRIS
lmk if anyone needs help navigating it
yea the 200 locks in each individual spot. everyone makes their own payment
why whats up did someone need more time
gotchu think should be good just confirming
okay bet bet. yea if anyone needs any help getting deposited just lmk
Sounds good thanks everyone should have it done by tonight
Andrew whats good bro! the rest of the group hopping in on the reservation?
Yo what's up. Yeah just one kid is holding us up. Will let you know by tonight if he can go
Should be good. Will get everybody to make deposit
yoyo ops team is asking me whats good
everyone whos 100% rollin we need them to tap in asap this afternoon
so we can get y'all processed
Yeah will get everybody's who's in to put down deposit
One kid might need to Saturday but is probabable
Aight word just lmk so I can put the note in on his account
yoyo, is it just gonna be 3 of you on the trip
Gonna at least be 5. Probably 6. 4th just signed up
okay word. just wanna make sure they make the cut. things are getting slim
Sup broo, dope. Who's gonna be the 6th?
my friend Aiden Hernandez. He will get the confirmation from his parents tmr if he can go. Most likely going
okay cool. lmk soon as you can brotha
The 6th just signed up. What time could we check in on the 7th at the hotel? Booking flights now
so checkin is technically at 3pm, but you can get there whenever. like if you arrive at 12 they'll still give you wristbands so you can go eat/drink on the resort until your room is ready
the room could also be ready before 3, but they'll tell you when to come back to the lobby when you get there
Ok great thanks. Sorry that it took this long
yoo I saw everyone is all paid up! excited for y'all
next step is once you get your flights, upload that info to your portals so we can set up airport transfers
Loved “yoo I saw everyone is all paid up! excited for y'all”
I think I put the flight in there yesterday
We all on that same flight
aight bet just duplicated that onto everyones account
whats good Andrew, not sure if you know but Kaan dropped out the trip. so Zach and Aiden's room changed to a 2 person occupancy, which leaves them a slight balance
Yo what's up. Will let them know thanks
